from collections import Counter


def merge_users(existing, incoming):
    result = {}
    for user in existing:
        result[user["id"]] = user
    for user in incoming:
        if user["id"] in result:
            raise ValueError(f"Duplicate user id: {user['id']}")
        result[user["id"]] = user
    return list(result.values())


def reconcile_inventory(stock_a, stock_b):
    merged = {}
    for item in stock_a:
        merged[item["sku"]] = item
    for item in stock_b:
        if item["sku"] in merged:
            raise ValueError(f"Duplicate SKU: {item['sku']}")
        merged[item["sku"]] = item
    return list(merged.values())


def deduplicate_records(records):
    emails = Counter(r["email"] for r in records)
    duplicates = [email for email, count in emails.items() if count > 1]
    if duplicates:
        raise ValueError(f"Duplicate emails: {duplicates}")
    return records
